features: 72H ODOUR PROTECTION: Men's deodorant spray is designed to tackle the effects of everyday stresses and strains and offer 72 hour odour protection
DUAL ACTIVE FORMULA: NIVEA's formula features two anti-perspirant actives that offer reliable, long-lasting hour sweat protection that cares for the skin
DRY FRAGRANCE: Men's anti-perspirant features a fresh blend of tangy citrus and herbal notes, designed for men who want invigorating maximum protection
HOW TO APPLY: Shake spray deodorant well before use. Hold can 15cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed
EVERYDAY USE: Whether taking an exam, rushing to work, or going to the gym, this NIVEA anti-perspirant spray prevents odour and helps the skin stay dry, all day
description: Product Description NIVEA MEN Dry Impact 72H Anti-Perspirant Deodorant Spray - Long-lasting, dry-feeling 72 hour odour protection Dry Impact 72H Anti-perspirant Deodorant Spray from NIVEA MEN offers long-lasting, dry-feeling protection against sweat and body odour. Its dual active formula is made with two anti-perspirant actives to actively fight the sources of sweat for up to 48 hours and offer long-lasting relief that helps tackle odour for up to 72 hours. The spray deodorant for men has a clean and inviting masculine fragrance which features scents of tangy citrus and herbal notes. Designed to be quick drying and leave behind minimal residue, the anti-perspirant spray can be applied in seconds, minimises stains on clothes, and its skin tolerance is dermatologically proven.  Application information: Shake well before use. Hold can 15cm from the underarm and spray. Allow product to dry completely before getting dressed. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Product benefits: 72H odour protection Long-lasting sweat protection Long-lasting dry feeling Invigorating citrus and herbal fragrance Dual active formula Dries quickly Suitable for daily use Spray application Skin tolerance dermatologically proven Ingredients Butane Isobutane Propane Cyclomethicone Aluminum Chlorohydrate Isopropyl Palmitate Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate Magnesium Aluminum Silicate Persea Gratissima Oil Octyldodecanol Disteardimonium Hectorite Dimethicone Propylene Carbonate Dimethiconol Linalool Limonene Citronellol Geraniol Coumarin Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone Eugenol Parfum Directions 1. Shake deodorant spray men well before use. 2. Hold the can 15cm away from the forearm and spray. 3. Allow the product to dry completely before getting dressed. Safety Warning Danger: Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurised container: May burst if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C. Empty can before recycling. Use exclusively for the intended purpose. Do not spray into eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Keep out of reach of children. Solvent Abuse Can Kill Instantly. Box Contains 6 x NIVEA MEN Dry Impact Plus 48h Anti-Perspirant 250ml Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd. Trinity Central Trinity Park Bickenhill Lane Birmingham B37 7ES See more
